hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: The Six Resort Lopburi in Lopburi offers a one-bedroom apartment with a bathroom. The ground-floor unit features a dining area, work desk, and a seating space.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a tea and coffee maker. The apartment includes a refrigerator, electric kettle, and a TV. Garden and mountain views enhance the stay.
Convenient Services: The property provides a 24-hour front desk, family rooms, and free on-site private parking. Don Mueang International Airport is 118 km away.
